name: local-seo
description: > Local SEO and Google Business Profile audit — diagnose why a business isn't ranking in the local pack / map results, and produce a fix plan. Covers Google Business Profile (GBP) completeness, NAP (name/address/phone) consistency across the site and citations, local pack & "near me" ranking factors, review velocity and response health, local landing-page quality, service-area pages, and LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema. Use this skill whenever the user asks about local rankings, map results, Google
author: nowork-studio
